title: MIN 680 (M) Amendment 1 wellbeing at sea
body: "Notice to all Ship Owners, Ship Operators, Managers, Masters, Officers and Seafarers  This notice should be read with: MIN 635 (M)Wellbeing at Sea Publications and MIN 664 (M) Safety climate tool (SCT) for the maritime industry  This MIN expires 24th September 2026 "
